title: Prepositions of Place and Time
description: Master in/on/at for place and time, basic movement prepositions (to/from/into), and avoid the most common learner errors with prepositions.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (prepositions of place; prepositions of time — in/on/at)
